## Summary

- Linear issue:
- Public pages changed:
- Mintlify preview URL:

## Review

- [ ] `bash scripts/honesty-grep.sh`
- [ ] `npx -y mint@latest validate`
- [ ] `npx -y mint@latest broken-links`
- [ ] `npx -y mint@latest export --output /tmp/soc2doc-docs-export.zip`
- [ ] Mintlify preview reviewed
- [ ] Owner approval captured for material positioning, policy, pricing, or API language
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated, or this is typo/formatting-only
- [ ] Docs feedback follow-ups created in Linear with `docs-feedback` when needed

## Notes

Call out any urgent correction, rollback risk, or product question created by this docs change.
